title: Stir-Fried Mian Noodles
description: A classic Chinese dish made with stir-fried mian noodles, romantic vegetables, and a blend of savory zha and jiang sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the romantic vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the mian noodles and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the zha sauce, jiang sauce, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the sauce mixture over the noodles and vegetables, and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
